lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ ਜਿਨਿ ਤਾਰਿਆ ਸਗਲ ਜਗਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: vaddaa saahib guroo milaaeaa jin taariaa sagal jagat |
lines.english: The Guru led me to meet the greatest Lord and Master; He saved the whole world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕੀਆ ਇਛਾ ਪੂਰੀਆ ਪਾਇਆ ਧੁਰਿ ਸੰਜੋਗ ॥
lines.translit: man keea ichhaa pooreea paaeaa dhur sanjog |
lines.english: The desires of the mind are fulfilled; I have attained my pre-destined Union with God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਭੋਗੇ ਭੋਗ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak paaeaa sach naam sad hee bhoge bhog |1|
lines.english: Nanak has obtained the True Name; He enjoys the enjoyments forever. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਾ ਕੇਰੀ ਦੋਸਤੀ ਮਾਇਆ ਕਾ ਸਨਬੰਧੁ ॥
lines.translit: manamukhaa keree dosatee maaeaa kaa sanabandh |
lines.english: Friendship with the self-willed manmukhs is an alliance with Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਚਰੁ ਪੈਨਨਿ ਖਾਵਨੑੇ ਤਿਚਰੁ ਰਖਨਿ ਗੰਢੁ ॥
lines.translit: jichar painan khaavanae tichar rakhan gandt |
lines.english: As long as they get food and clothing, they stick around.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵੇਖਦਿਆ ਹੀ ਭਜਿ ਜਾਨਿ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਪਾਇਨਿ ਬੰਧੁ ॥
lines.translit: vekhadiaa hee bhaj jaan kade na paaein bandh |
lines.english: As we watch, they run away; they never stand firm.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਕੀ ਸਾਰ ਨ ਜਾਣਨੀ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਅਗਿਆਨੀ ਅੰਧੁ ॥
lines.translit: jeea kee saar na jaananee manamukh agiaanee andh |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs are ignorant and blind; they do not know the secrets of the soul.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਦਿਨਿ ਕਿਛੁ ਨ ਹੋਵਈ ਤਿਤੁ ਦਿਨਿ ਬੋਲਨਿ ਗੰਧੁ ॥
lines.translit: jit din kichh na hovee tith din bolan gandh |
lines.english: But on that day when they receive nothing, then they start to curse.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜਾ ਗੰਢੁ ਨ ਚਲਈ ਚਿਕੜਿ ਪਥਰ ਬੰਧੁ ॥
lines.translit: koorraa gandt na chalee chikarr pathar bandh |
lines.english: The false bond does not last; it is like stones joined with mud.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਧੇ ਆਪੁ ਨ ਜਾਣਨੀ ਫਕੜੁ ਪਿਟਨਿ ਧੰਧੁ ॥
lines.translit: andhe aap na jaananee fakarr pittan dhandh |
lines.english: The blind do not understand themselves; they are engrossed in false worldly entanglements.

lines.gurmukhi: ਝੂਠੈ ਮੋਹਿ ਲਪਟਾਇਆ ਹਉ ਹਉ ਕਰਤ ਬਿਹੰਧੁ ॥
lines.translit: jhootthai mohi lapattaaeaa hau hau karat bihandh |
lines.english: Entangled in false attachments, they pass their lives in egotism and self-conceit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਜਿਸੁ ਆਪਣੀ ਧੁਰਿ ਪੂਰਾ ਕਰਮੁ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: kripaa kare jis aapanee dhur pooraa karam karee |
lines.english: But that being, whom the Lord has blessed with His Mercy from the very beginning, does perfect deeds, and accumulates good karma.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਰਤੇ ਦੀਦਾਰ ਸੇਈ ਸਚੁ ਹਾਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: jo rate deedaar seee sach haak |
lines.english: Those who are imbued with the Lord's Vision, speak the Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਜਾਤਾ ਖਸਮੁ ਕਿਉ ਲਭੈ ਤਿਨਾ ਖਾਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: jinee jaataa khasam kiau labhai tinaa khaak |
lines.english: How can I obtain the dust of those who realize their Lord and Master?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੇ ਜਨ ਉਬਰੇ ਜੋ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਰਣਿ ਪਰੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jan naanak se jan ubare jo satigur saran pare |2|
lines.english: O servant Nanak, those humble beings alone are saved, who enter the Sanctuary of the True Guru. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਿਸੈ ਸਚਾ ਮਹਲੁ ਖੁਲੈ ਭਰਮ ਤਾਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: disai sachaa mehal khulai bharam taak |
lines.english: One sees the Mansion of the Lord's Presence, when the door of doubt is opened.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਮੈਲਾ ਵੇਕਾਰੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਪਾਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: man mailaa vekaar hovai sang paak |
lines.english: The mind, stained by corruption, becomes pure by associating with them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਹੋਇ ਨਿਹਾਲੁ ਬਿੰਦਕ ਨਦਰਿ ਝਾਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: man tan hoe nihaal bindak nadar jhaak |
lines.english: My mind and body are enraptured, when the Lord blesses me, even for an instant, with His Glance of Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸਹਿ ਦਿਖਾਲੇ ਮਹਲੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਨ ਮਿਲੈ ਧਾਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: jiseh dikhaale mehal tis na milai dhaak |
lines.english: That one, unto whom the Mansion of the Lord's Presence is revealed, is never pushed or shoved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਉ ਨਿਧਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਲਾਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: nau nidh naam nidhaan gur kai sabad laag |
lines.english: The nine treasures, and the treasure of the Naam are obtained by commitment to the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੈ ਮਿਲੈ ਸੰਤ ਖਾਕੁ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਜਿਸੈ ਭਾਗੁ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: tisai milai sant khaak masatak jisai bhaag |5|
lines.english: He alone is blessed with the dust of the feet of the Saints, upon whose forehead such pre-ordained desiny is inscribed. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁੰਦਰ ਬਚਨ ਤੁਮ ਸੁਣਹੁ ਛਬੀਲੀ ਪਿਰੁ ਤੈਡਾ ਮਨ ਸਾਧਾਰਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: sundar bachan tum sunahu chhabeelee pir taiddaa man saadhaaran |
lines.english: Listen to these beautiful words, O beauteous bride; your Beloved Lord is your mind's only support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਣਾਖੀ ਕੂ ਸਚੁ ਵੈਣੁ ਸੁਣਾਈ ਜੋ ਤਉ ਕਰੇ ਉਧਾਰਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: haranaakhee koo sach vain sunaaee jo tau kare udhaaran |
lines.english: O deer-eyed bride, I speak the Truth, which shall save you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਣੀ ਨਾਹੀ ਝੂਣੀ ਨਾਹੀ ਨਾਹੀ ਕਿਸੈ ਵਿਹੂਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: aoonee naahee jhoonee naahee naahee kisai vihoonee |
lines.english: I lack nothing, and I am not sad or depressed; I have no deficiency at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਰਜਨ ਸੇਤੀ ਨੇਹੁ ਰਚਾਇਓ ਦਸਿ ਵਿਖਾ ਮੈ ਕਾਰਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: durajan setee nehu rachaaeo das vikhaa mai kaaran |
lines.english: You have fallen in love with an evil person; tell me - show me why!

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰੁ ਛੈਲੁ ਛਬੀਲਾ ਛਡਿ ਗਵਾਇਓ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਕਰਮਿ ਵਿਹੂਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: pir chhail chhabeelaa chhadd gavaaeo duramat karam vihoonee |
lines.english: I abandoned and lost my fascinating and beautiful Husband Lord; in this evil-mindedness, I have lost my good fortune.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਹਉ ਭੁਲੀ ਨਾ ਹਉ ਚੁਕੀ ਨਾ ਮੈ ਨਾਹੀ ਦੋਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: naa hau bhulee naa hau chukee naa mai naahee dosaa |
lines.english: I am not mistaken, and I am not confused; I have no egotism, and commit no offense.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਈ ਸੋੁਹਾਗਣਿ ਸਾਈ ਭਾਗਣਿ ਜੈ ਪਿਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: saaee souhaagan saaee bhaagan jai pir kirapaa dhaaree |
lines.english: She alone is the blessed soul-bride, and she alone is fortunate, upon whom the Husband Lord has showered His Mercy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਹਉ ਲਾਈ ਤਿਤੁ ਹਉ ਲਗੀ ਤੂ ਸੁਣਿ ਸਚੁ ਸੰਦੇਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: jit hau laaee tith hau lagee too sun sach sandesaa |
lines.english: As You have linked me, so I am linked; listen to my true message.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮਹੀਣ ਧਨ ਕਰੈ ਬਿਨੰਤੀ ਕਦਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਆਵੈ ਵਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: karamaheen dhan karai binantee kad naanak aavai vaaree |
lines.english: The unfortunate soul-bride makes this prayer: O Nanak, when will my turn come?

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰਿ ਅਉਗਣ ਤਿਸ ਕੇ ਸਭਿ ਗਵਾਏ ਗਲ ਸੇਤੀ ਲਾਇ ਸਵਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: pir aaugan tis ke sabh gavaae gal setee laae savaaree |
lines.english: Her Husband Lord takes away all her faults and mistakes; hugging her close in His embrace, He embellishes her.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਸੁਹਾਗਣਿ ਮਾਣਹਿ ਰਲੀਆ ਇਕ ਦੇਵਹੁ ਰਾਤਿ ਮੁਰਾਰੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sabh suhaagan maaneh raleea ik devahu raat muraaree |1|
lines.english: All the blessed soul-brides celebrate and make merry; bless me as well with a night of bliss, O Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਧਿਆਇ ਤੂ ਸਭਿ ਦੁਖ ਵਿਸਾਰਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: satigur purakh dhiaae too sabh dukh visaaranahaar |
lines.english: Meditate on the True Guru, the Primal Being; He is the Destroyer of all pains.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਹੇ ਮਨ ਤੂ ਡੋਲਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਸਾ ਪੂਰਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: kaahe man too ddolataa har manasaa pooranahaar |
lines.english: Why do you waver, O my mind? The Lord is the Fulfiller of hopes and desires.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਾ ਆਰਾਧਿ ਮਨ ਸਭਿ ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਜਾਹਿ ਵਿਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: har naamaa aaraadh man sabh kilavikh jaeh vikaar |
lines.english: Worship and adore the Lord's Name, O my mind; all sins and corruption shall be washed away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਰੰਗੁ ਲਗਾ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: jin kau poorab likhiaa tin rang lagaa nirankaar |
lines.english: Those who are blessed with such pre-ordained destiny, are in love with the Formless Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਨੀ ਛਡਿਆ ਮਾਇਆ ਸੁਆਵੜਾ ਧਨੁ ਸੰਚਿਆ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: onee chhaddiaa maaeaa suaavarraa dhan sanchiaa naam apaar |
lines.english: They abandon the tastes of Maya, and gather in the infinite wealth of the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਠੇ ਪਹਰ ਇਕਤੈ ਲਿਵੈ ਮੰਨੇਨਿ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: atthe pehar ikatai livai manen hukam apaar |
lines.english: Twenty-four hours a day, they are lovingly absorbed in the One Lord; they surrender and accept the Will of the Infinite Lord.
